pageContext.name: Halloween (Regular Edition)
pageContext.description: 'The night he came home!'  Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present the Halloween (Regular Edition) screen print. This timed edition hand-numbered screen print was released in October 2021. Art by Juan Ramos and printed by D&L Screen Printing.   Don't miss your chance to add the Halloween Screen Print to your John Carpenter collection!
